<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/diff. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\Diff; use function gettype; use function is_object; use function sprintf; use Exception; final class ConfigurationException extends InvalidArgumentException { public function __construct(string $option, string $expected, mixed $value, int $code = 0, ?Exception $previous = null) { parent::__construct( sprintf( 'Option "%s" must be %s, got "%s".', $option, $expected, is_object($value) ? $value::class : (null === $value ? '<null>' : gettype($value) . '#' . $value), ), $code, $previous, ); } }
